SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:35am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Edward M Mc Donough, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kane.

EXHR(A): Trial Brief and Exhibit binder

EXHA(1): Exhibit binder

Respondent Witness: Margaret McKelvie, Michael Victor Rolovich and Edward McDonough

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
